criteria.label: Software-core autonomy active
criteria.description: The bounded software-core autonomy phase is active and stable.

criteria.label: Canonical operator work system
criteria.description: Inbox, todos, backlog, ideas, and runs are live as canonical surfaces.

criteria.label: Compatibility retirement complete
criteria.description: The compatibility retirement family is complete.

criteria.label: Durable persistence live
criteria.description: Configured runtimes no longer rely on fallback in-memory persistence.

criteria.label: Foundry path live
criteria.description: At least one real project has moved through the packet-backed foundry path.

criteria.label: Governance drills green
criteria.description: Constrained, degraded, recovery, restore, rollback, and blocked-approval drills have live evidence.

criteria.label: External-host-only dependency removed
criteria.description: The bootstrap controller no longer depends on external-host-only behavior for normal continuation.
